title: Onto Innovation Software Engineer Intern Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# Onto Innovation Software Engineer Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Onto Innovation Software Engineer Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Stanhope, NJ
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Onto Innovation
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Onto Innovation is offering a Software Engineer Intern internship position in Stanhope, NJ. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Onto Innovation's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Onto Innovation interview and increase your chances of success.
